title: Doc Police Check
content: Police check la quy trinh xac minh ly lich tu phap cua ung vien truoc khi nhan viec.

title: Doc Employer Guide
content: Employer can mot quy trinh tuyen dung minh bach va co checklist xac minh thong tin.

title: Content Style Guide
content: Giong van de xuat: professional, ro rang, tranh slogan qua da. Cau truc de xuat: Mo dau, Noi dung chinh, Ket luan.

title: Doc Candidate Experience
content: Candidate experience trong quy trinh screening anh huong truc tiep den ty le chap nhan offer va hinh anh employer brand.

title: Doc Compliance Note
content: Compliance note: mot so vi tri bat buoc kiem tra ly lich de dap ung chinh sach noi bo va quy dinh phap ly.

title: Doc Faq Processing Time
content: FAQ: Police check thuong mat 1-3 ngay lam viec tuy theo nguon du lieu va yeu cau xac minh.

title: Doc Required Documents
content: Police check document requirements may include a valid photo ID, proof of address, and signed consent form, depending on policy.

title: Doc Who Needs Police Check
content: Police check is commonly required for first-time job applicants in sensitive roles, childcare, healthcare, and finance.

title: Doc Tone Guideline
content: Noi dung blog nen ro rang, ngan gon, va giu giong van chuyen nghiep.
